description:
As an admin user
  I want to manage customers
  So that I can maintain customer database and manage their accounts

steps.name: I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
the customers page should be loaded
the customers table should be visible

elements.name: Admin can see Add Customer button

steps.name: I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
the Add Customer button should be visible
I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
a success message should be displayed
I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
the customer detail page should be loaded
associated tickets count should be displayed

name: Customer Management - Support Ticket Desk

description:
As a logged in user
  I want to see the dashboard with statistics and recent tickets
  So that I can quickly understand the system status

steps.name: I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
I should see Open Tickets card
I should see Assigned to Me card
I should see Total Tickets card
I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
I navigate to Tickets from dashboard
I should be on the Tickets page
I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
the recent tickets table should be visible
the recent tickets table should display up to 5 tickets

elements.name: Navigate to tickets list via View All button

steps.name: I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
I should be on the Tickets page

name: Dashboard - Support Ticket Desk

description:
As a system
  I want to enforce role-based access control
  So that users can only access features permitted to their role

steps.name: I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
I should be able to navigate to Tickets
I should be able to navigate to Customers
the Add Customer button should be visible
I login with "agent" username and "agent123" password

name: Role-Based Access Control - Support Ticket Desk

description:
As a user of the Support Ticket Desk application
  I want to be able to login and logout securely
  So that I can access my assigned tickets

steps.name: I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
I login with "agent" username and "agent123" password
I try to login without entering credentials
I should still see the login form

name: Authentication - Support Ticket Desk

description:
As a support admin or agent
  I want to manage tickets efficiently
  So that I can track and resolve customer issues

steps.name: I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
delete button should be visible for tickets

elements.name: Create a new ticket with all required fields

steps.name: I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
a success message should be displayed

name: Ticket Management - Support Ticket Desk

description:
As a support team member
  I want to view ticket details and manage comments
  So that I can properly handle customer issues

steps.name: I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
the ticket detail page should be loaded
I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
I add a comment "This is a test comment"
the comment should be added successfully
the comment should appear in the comments list
I login with "admin" username and "admin123" password
I should return to the tickets list

name: Ticket Details and Comments - Support Ticket Desk
